case_title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, VS. RACHEL SORENSON et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT SORENSON, RACHEL

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SORENSON, RACHEL HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-04-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RACHEL SORENSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
